original: Inhuman Desire
Protected from his aroma by your gear, you’re only forced to endure the brash display of his dick and balls.
The harsh, biting winds of the Uvetan tundra are quick to deliver its scent to you, the manly, pungent aroma tickling your brain.
You manage to ignore both the brazen display and his musk, letting the breeze carry it away.
You lose focus entirely for a second, eyeing up his fat, throbbing dickmeat and inhaling as deeply as you can.
If you try hard enough, you think you can catch the slightest whiff of him through the filter.
The scent should be fleeting, pushed away by the roaring gale, but it sinks into your head.

You find yourself salivating as you watch his member throb in his strong, teasing paw, and he smiles toothily at you. “Give up and Vark let you touch.” You suddenly snap out of it, remembering where you are, and shake your head to clear it. A soft heat is coursing through your skin, leaving you hornier than you were before...
You manage to sidestep him and he rolls back onto his feet, clearly much angrier than before.
He connects, his claws like miniature daggers as they glide across the surface of your "+(e.inventory.hasArmor?"[pc.armor]":"[pc.skinFurScalesNoun]")
\n\nYour wounds are still open and bleeding.
\n\nYou are now bleeding.
Fortunately for you, you manage to roll out of his flight path, leaving him to slam into a cave wall behind you. He’s quick to clamber to his feet and snarl at you as he rubs his head.
You don’t manage to get out of the way nearly fast enough, and he slams into you like a dreadnought, pushing the air out of your lungs with enough force to nearly collapse them.

nuts and cock roll against your mask. Your suit prevents the smell from reaching you, and you headbutt him in the jewels, causing him to roll off of you with a howl of anguish. He reorients himself surprisingly quickly, snatching up his loincloth and baring his fangs.

offensive, pungent scent explodes across your senses. Your eyes begin watering and your lungs tingle, trying to hold your breath. You don’t manage for long, the subtly spicy tinge he leaves in the air making you squirm and eventually gasp, gulping thick lungfuls through your mouth and nose, your limbs twitching as you take a direct hit of pure man musk.
\n\n

His fist slams into you like an avalanche, a sickening crack echoing in your chest. You can’t help but lose hold of your [pc.meleeWeapon] in the shock of the impact, sending it spiraling onto the stone a few feet away.
You deftly weave away from the strike, shoving him backwards and escaping his reach. Probably not a great idea to get close to him.
Vark stumbles for a moment, but regains his composure, shaking off his impairment and roaring in defiance. His eyes lock on you, his jaw setting. He’s not going to let that one slide.

\n\n“No idea!” you answer back, pushing back the feral cat-man as best you can. Anno just shrugs and takes her place at your side to defend you -- and her home!
